classes.label: Person
classes.description: An individual, typically a staff member or student in the education system.

classes.label: Organization
classes.description: An entity such as a school, hospital, or administrative department.

classes.label: Financial Record
classes.description: A record of financial transactions, budgets, or assets.

classes.label: Document
classes.description: A physical or digital document or identifier.

datatype_properties.label: has email
datatype_properties.description: The email address of the person.
evidence: 电子信箱 电子邮件地址
"item_name": "电子信箱"
"description": "电子邮件地址"

datatype_properties.label: has ethnicity code
datatype_properties.description: A 2-digit code representing ethnicity (e.g., 01 for Han).
evidence: 民族码 取用2位数字代码，如： 01 汉族，02 蒙古族
"description": "取用2位数字代码，如： 01 汉族，02 蒙古族"

datatype_properties.label: is only child
datatype_properties.description: Indicates if the person is an only child (1 for yes, 0 for no).
evidence: 是否独生子 女 1 是独生子女 0 不是独生子女
"item_name": "是否独生子 女"
"description": "1 是独生子女 0 不是独生子女"

datatype_properties.label: has family email
datatype_properties.description: The family's email address.
evidence: 家庭电子信 箱
"item_name": "家庭电子信 箱"

datatype_properties.label: has relationship code
datatype_properties.description: A code indicating the relationship of a family member or contact.
evidence: 关系码
"item_name": "关系码"

datatype_properties.label: has position sort order
datatype_properties.description: The sequential order of a leading cadre within a leadership group.
evidence: 职务排序 指领导干部在领导班子 内排列的顺序号
"description": "指领导干部在领导班子 内排列的顺序号"

datatype_properties.label: has separation date
datatype_properties.description: The date the person left the organization.
evidence: 离职日期 离开本单位的日期

datatype_properties.label: has separation reason code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the reason of leaving the organization.
evidence: 离职原因码

datatype_properties.label: has separation destination
datatype_properties.description: The destination or next step after leaving the organization.
evidence: 离职去向 离开本单位工作岗位后 的去向

datatype_properties.label: has retirement category code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the category of retirement or separation.
evidence: 离退类别码

datatype_properties.label: has retirement start date
datatype_properties.description: The official date of retirement approved by the organization.
evidence: 离退起始日 期 由组织、人事部门批准 的离退休日期

datatype_properties.label: has post-retirement rank code
datatype_properties.description: The rank or level enjoyed after retirement.
evidence: 离退后享受 级别码

datatype_properties.label: has pension payment unit name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the unit responsible for paying the pension.
evidence: 离退休费支 付单位 离退休后，支付离退休 费的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: has post-retirement management unit
datatype_properties.description: The specific unit managing the person after retirement.
evidence: 离退后管理 单位 离退后的具体管理单位 名称

datatype_properties.label: has remote settlement location
datatype_properties.description: The location where a retired person is settled away from the original location.
evidence: 异地安置地 点 离退后安置到异地生活 的地点

datatype_properties.label: has re-employment start date
datatype_properties.description: The start date of re-employment after retirement.
evidence: 返聘起始日 期 离退休后被重新聘任工 作的起始日期

datatype_properties.label: has re-employment end date
datatype_properties.description: The end date of re-employment after retirement.
evidence: 返聘终止日 期 离退休后被重新聘任工 作的终止日期

datatype_properties.label: has re-employment unit ID
datatype_properties.description: The ID of the re-employment unit (school-defined).
evidence: 返聘单位号 重新聘任的工作单位 号，学校自编

datatype_properties.label: has re-employment position
datatype_properties.description: The job position of the re-employment.
evidence: 返聘岗位 重新聘任的工作岗位

datatype_properties.label: has remuneration
datatype_properties.description: The monthly remuneration for re-employment (CNY/month).
evidence: 返聘酬金 重新聘任工作的劳动报 酬，单位：元/月

datatype_properties.label: has remuneration source
datatype_properties.description: The funding source for the re-employment remuneration.
evidence: 返聘金来源 返聘资金的经费来源

datatype_properties.label: has re-employment workload
datatype_properties.description: The monthly workload for re-employment (hours/month).
evidence: 返聘工作量 单位：小时/月

datatype_properties.label: has rehabilitation diagnosis hospital
datatype_properties.description: The name of the hospital where rehabilitation diagnosis was performed.
evidence: 康复诊断医 院 进行康复诊断的医院名 称

datatype_properties.label: has rehabilitation certificate
datatype_properties.description: The rehabilitation certificate issued by the hospital.
evidence: 康复诊断证 明 医院开具的康复诊断证 明

datatype_properties.label: has approval unit name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the superior department that approved the overseas trip.
evidence: 审批单位 批准出国（境）并签发 审批文件的上级主管部 门名称
"description": "批准出国（境）并签发 审批文件的上级主管部 门名称"

datatype_properties.label: has land ID
datatype_properties.description: School-defined land identifier.
evidence: 用地编号 学校自编

datatype_properties.label: has land area
datatype_properties.description: The area of the land in square meters.
evidence: 占地面积 单位：平方米

datatype_properties.label: has book barcode
datatype_properties.description: The barcode corresponding to a book.
evidence: 图书条形码 图书对应的条形码
"description": "图书对应的条形码"

datatype_properties.label: has journal barcode
datatype_properties.description: The barcode corresponding to a journal.
evidence: 期刊条形码 期刊对应的条形码
"description": "期刊对应的条形码"

object_properties.label: diagnosed at
object_properties.description: The hospital where the person received rehabilitation diagnosis.
evidence: 康复诊断医 院 进行康复诊断的医院名 称

object_properties.label: paid by
object_properties.description: The organization responsible for paying the person's pension.
evidence: 离退休费支 付单位 离退休后，支付离退休 费的单位名称

object_properties.label: managed by
object_properties.description: The organization managing the person after retirement.
evidence: 离退后管理 单位 离退后的具体管理单位 名称

object_properties.label: settled at
object_properties.description: The location where a retired person is settled.
evidence: 异地安置地 点 离退后安置到异地生活 的地点

object_properties.label: re-employed by
object_properties.description: The organization that re-employed the person.
evidence: 返聘单位号 重新聘任的工作单位 号，学校自编

object_properties.label: approved by
object_properties.description: The organization that approved the person's overseas trip.
evidence: 审批单位 批准出国（境）并签发 审批文件的上级主管部 门名称
